subcodes.first_line: By the life of our Beloved and your Beloved, and our Object of Desire and the Object of Desire of all who dwell in earth and heaven, this mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر محبوبنا و محبوبکم و مقصودنا و مقصود من فی الارض و السماء این ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
